sourceLegislation: Permanent Phase 1 NR zoning (Ord. 127376 / CB 120993) implementing WA HB 1110; ADUs per HB 1337 / Ord. 127211
disclaimer: Preliminary feasibility ruleset. Constants marked verified:false are drawn from City summaries and architect zoning guides, NOT a line-by-line read of the live code, and MUST be confirmed against SMC 23.44.011 / 23.42.022 before use.

far.citation: SMC 23.44.011; ADU floor area per SMC 23.42.022
far.appliesTo: total chargeable floor area of all structures on the lot
far.previousRule: Flat 0.5 FAR regardless of density (pre-June 2025); ADUs were previously FAR-exempt. Both changed.

minFloorAreaSf.note: Budget is the GREATER of (tier FAR x net lot area) or this floor.

tiers.note: <= 1600 sf lot area per unit (base, before bonuses)

bonuses.note: Frequent Transit Area with green space
Qualifying stacked flats (tree/green or near school)

exemptFromFar.note: Underground stories, or portions no more than ~4 ft above grade.
Common walls separating attached dwelling units.
Decks/balconies not used for common circulation (never GFA).

far.note: RSL ~0.75; most RSL transitioning to LR1.
